text.title: Performance Testing Tools: k6 and Locust Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Test hits cold cache; p99 spike on first 30s contaminates the run.
antipattern.fix: Add 30s ramp-up stage before measurement window.

antipattern.symptom: Perf job runs every PR but never fails; latency regresses 4× over a quarter.
antipattern.root-cause: Thresholds configured but exit code ignored.
antipattern.fix: Use --fail-on-threshold or check exit code; remove || true.

antipattern.symptom: Load test hits prod; on-call paged at 3am with synthetic load alerts.
antipattern.fix: Use staging URL with warm fixtures; reject perf scripts that hit prod hostname.
